---
title: "Chengwei Zhang"
format: html
---

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="38%"}

## Profile

![](files/profile.jpg){width="78%" fig-alt="Profile image"}

[Email](mailto:chz147@ucsd.edu) | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/chengwei-zhang-560180379)

:::

::: {.column width="62%"}

## Current

- **MSBA Student** | University of California, San Diego

---

## Education

- **MSBA** | University of California, San Diego  
- **BA in Mathematics** | University of California, Santa Barbara

---

## Interests

- Statistics  
- Data Analysis  
- Business Analytics

---

## About this site

I use this website to organize and share my coursework, homework assignments, and class projects.

:::
:::
